function.name: init_bler_stats
function.signature: static void init_bler_stats(const NR_bler_options_t *bler_options, NR_bler_stats_t *bler_stats, frame_t frame)

bug.description: race condition between timer expiry handler and normal message processing

prompt:
There is a race condition between timer expiry handler and normal message processing downstream of function init_bler_stats in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/gNB_scheduler_primitives.c:2957.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
